name: Matan Czuckermann
title: Real-Time Software Engineer
summary: Software Engineer graduating with honors (GPA 91, Cum Laude) with 3 years of professional experience in C++ and Python. Strong background in modern C++17 development, including smart pointers, templates, RAII, move semantics, and the STL, along with Linux-based environments, real-time embedded software, multi-threaded programming, and performance optimization. Experienced building multi-agent AI systems with specialized LLM agents orchestrated in staged pipelines. Proficient with AI-assisted development (Claude, Cursor), DevOps workflows including CI/CD pipelines, automation scripting, system integration, and Git-based version control. Additional experience with React and React Native.

experience.title: Real-Time Software Engineer
highlights: Led design and development of a real-time, multi-process C++ system integrating hardware under strict timing constraints
Built large-scale real-time C++ components using microservices and advanced communication protocols on Linux
Developed production C++17 code using modern C++ features including smart pointers, templates, RAII, move semantics, and STL containers/algorithms
Implemented real-time synchronization and interrupt-handling with semaphores, shared memory, and Ethernet interrupts
Diagnosed complex timing, protocol, and system-freeze issues using Valgrind, Wireshark, trace-cmd, and IDA
Built automation tools in Python, Bash, and MATLAB for validation, testing, and integration
Collaborated with DevOps teams to improve CI/CD pipelines and reduce system downtime
Designed quantum-resistant communication protocols integrating KYBER and Dilithium alongside RSA, ECC, and AES

projects.name: Job Agent System
projects.description: Multi-agent AI pipeline that scrapes job boards, scores matches against a resume, tailors documents per role, and generates cover letters using Claude

education.institution: Ort Braude College of Engineering, Carmiel

additional: Israel fencing national team member; represented Israel in multiple World Cups
Israel representative at the Zone Championship for Tokyo Olympic Games qualification
Patent No. 243258 — Self Contained Breathing Apparatus Emergency Air Supply
